recommendations.title: Federal Bank Heist
recommendations.overview: "The Baron" wanted to commit the perfect heist involving 3 tons of money and no violence. For this he would need the right people willing to get 1 million dollars to take part in this job. Based on true events, in 2005, 168,000,000 Brazilian Real (al

recommendations.title: Alien Outpost
recommendations.overview: A documentary crew follows an elite unit of soldiers in the wake of an alien invasion.

recommendations.title: Mad Money
recommendations.overview: Three female employees of the Federal Reserve plot to steal money that is about to be destroyed.

recommendations.title: How to Rob a Bank
recommendations.overview: Caught in the middle of a bank robbery, a slacker and a bank employee become the ones who arbitrate the intense situation.

recommendations.title: In China They Eat Dogs
recommendations.overview: Arvid is an ordinary bank clerk who lives a rather unassuming life with his dear girlfriend. But his life is turned completely upside down when he bravely manages to avert a robbery against the bank where he works.

recommendations.title: Zeitgeist: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A documentary examining possible historical and modern conspiracies surrounding Christianity, the 9/11 terrorist attacks, and the Federal Reserve bank.

recommendations.title: Wheelman
recommendations.overview: A getaway driver for a bank robbery realizes he has been double crossed and races to find out who betrayed him.

recommendations.title: Dog Day Afternoon
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of would-be Brooklyn bank robbers John Wojtowicz and Salvatore Naturile. Sonny and Sal attempt a bank heist which quickly turns sour and escalates into a hostage situation and stand-off with the police. As Sonny's motives for

recommendations.title: Repeaters
recommendations.overview: A gritty mind-bending thriller about three twenty-somethings who find themselves in an impossible time labyrinth, where each day they awaken to the same terrifying day as the preceding one.

recommendations.title: Tiger House
recommendations.overview: A young gymnast battles a group of bank robbers at the home of her boyfriend.
